sampled_generation_cases.answer: I don't have enough information in the provided context to answer that.

[Doc: Pearly gates | ID: 6403e099-72dd-466b-bb7b-8cbf42b0d46b | Section: NQ Benchmark doc897]

sampled_generation_cases.query: the most common form of megalithic architecture in europe is
sampled_generation_cases.answer: The most common form of megalithic architecture in Europe is the portal tomb. This consists of upright stones (orthostats) with one or more large flat capstones forming a roof [Doc: Megalith, Section: General].
retrieval_contexts:
Megalith
[Doc: Megalith | ID: 334ac1bf-053d-4692-8c17-c02e6c63d9a7 | Section: NQ Benchmark doc88248]
Megalith
The most common type of megalithic construction in Europe is the portal tomb – a chamber consisting of upright stones (orthostats) with one or more large flat capstones forming a roof.

Currencies of the European Union
[Doc: Currencies of the European Union | ID: c78fc06f-2781-4df7-a477-d1b6dbcf7b07 | Section: NQ Benchmark doc15008]
Currencies of the European Union
The euro is the result of the European Union's project for economic and monetary union which came fully into being on 1 January 2002 and it is now the currency used by the majority of European Union's member states, with all but two bound to adopt it. It is the currency used by the institutions of the European Union and in the failed European Constitution it was to be included with the symbols of Europe as the formal currency of the European Union. The euro is also widely used by other states outside the EU.

Ploidy
[Doc: Ploidy | ID: 4a452b98-0744-4ff0-bfbe-89997037a2cb | Section: NQ Benchmark doc79264]
Ploidy
Gametes (sperm and ova) are haploid cells. The haploid gametes produced by most organisms combine to form a zygote with n pairs of chromosomes, i.e. 2n chromosomes in total. The chromosomes in each pair, one of which comes from the sperm and one from the egg, are said to be homologous. Cells and organisms with pairs of homologous chromosomes are called diploid. For example, most animals are diploid and produce haploid gametes. During meiosis, sex cell precursors have their number of chromosomes halved by randomly "choosing" one member of each pair of chromosomes, resulting in haploid gametes. Because homologous chromosomes usually differ genetically, gametes usually differ genetically from one another.[citation needed]

Megalith
[Doc: Megalith | ID: 334ac1bf-053d-4692-8c17-c02e6c63d9a7 | Section: NQ Benchmark doc88248]
It is assumed that most portal tombs were originally covered by earthen mounds.

Crown Jewels of the United Kingdom
[Doc: Crown Jewels of the United Kingdom | ID: 1cba7a7c-36b9-4263-8f6c-9a585e93b131 | Section: NQ Benchmark doc14516]
In 1953, nine centuries after the coronation of its namesake, St Edward's Crown was placed on the head of Queen Elizabeth II in what is now the only ceremony of its kind in Europe.[52]

sampled_generation_cases.query: who designed the earth day flag in 1969
sampled_generation_cases.answer: The Earth Day flag in 1969 was designed by John McConnell. This flag features The Blue Marble image of Earth and was presented to the United Nations as a symbol for consideration [Doc: Flag of Earth, Section: General].
retrieval_contexts:
Republic Day (India)
[Doc: Republic Day (India) | ID: a4d83957-653c-41ed-89ec-d189cd1668fa | Section: NQ Benchmark doc76232]
Republic Day (India)
The Chief Guest of the function is the President of India who arrives escorted by the (PBG), a cavalry unit. When the President arrives, the PBG commander asks the unit to give the National Salute, which is followed by the playing of the Indian National Anthem, Jana Gana Mana, by the Army. The Army develops the ceremony of display by the massed bands in which Military Bands, Pipe and Drum Bands, Buglers and Trumpeters from various Army Regiments besides bands from the Navy and Air Force take part which play popular tunes like Abide With Me, Mahatma Gandhi's favourite hymn, and Saare Jahan Se Achcha at the end.[5][6][7]

Flag of Earth
[Doc: Flag of Earth | ID: 870092f5-e975-4eb3-b508-3594b57237b3 | Section: NQ Benchmark doc37757]
Flag of Earth
A flag designed by John McConnell in 1969 for the first Earth Day is a dark blue field charged with The Blue Marble, a famous NASA photo of the Earth as seen from outer space. The first edition of McConnell's flag used screen-printing and used different colors: ocean and land were blue and the clouds were white. McConnell presented his flag to the United Nations as a symbol for consideration.[1]

Pledge of Allegiance (United States)
[Doc: Pledge of Allegiance (United States) | ID: 08c49f8d-e333-40b0-89b7-cf93e0c14037 | Section: NQ Benchmark doc50543]
The most recent alteration of its wording came on Flag Day in 1954, when the words "under God" were added.[6]

Apollo 11
[Doc: Apollo 11 | ID: 0dae9708-0d64-4e05-ad9f-09757abf4fb1 | Section: NQ Benchmark doc30933]
Apollo 11
Apollo 11 was the spaceflight that landed the first two humans on the Moon. Mission commander Neil Armstrong and pilot Buzz Aldrin, both American, landed the lunar module Eagle on July 20, 1969, at 20:18 UTC. Armstrong became the first human to step onto the lunar surface six hours after landing on July 21 at 02:56:15 UTC; Aldrin joined him about 20 minutes later.

Apollo 11
[Doc: Apollo 11 | ID: 0dae9708-0d64-4e05-ad9f-09757abf4fb1 | Section: NQ Benchmark doc30933]
They spent about two and a quarter hours together outside the spacecraft, and collected 47.5 pounds (21.5Â kg) of lunar material to bring back to Earth.

sampled_generation_cases.query: difference between document type declaration and document type definition
sampled_generation_cases.answer: A document type declaration (DOCTYPE) is the statement in an XML or SGML document that associates it with a document type definition (DTD), which defines the structure and rules for that document type. The DOCTYPE appears near the start of the document and establishes that the document follows the referenced DTD [Doc: Document type definition, Section: General].
retrieval_contexts:
Document type definition
[Doc: Document type definition | ID: 0e1b62a0-741c-4f16-b584-cdc69cab7770 | Section: NQ Benchmark doc62471]
Document type definition
A DTD is associated with an XML or SGML document by means of a document type declaration (DOCTYPE). The DOCTYPE appears in the syntactic fragment doctypedecl near the start of an XML document.[2] The declaration establishes that the document is an instance of the type defined by the referenced DTD.

Opposition to the War of 1812 in the United States
[Doc: Opposition to the War of 1812 in the United States | ID: 9063d2c5-4f93-45d7-8dd0-0434a903a6d2 | Section: NQ Benchmark doc47371]
Henry Clay and John C. Calhoun pushed a declaration of war through Congress, stressing a short war had the added benefit of permitting the United States to grab valuable farmlands in the British colony of Canada.

Sex differences in humans
[Doc: Sex differences in humans | ID: 710e35fb-ea8f-4fd3-83a1-a127dfe8b129 | Section: NQ Benchmark doc100061]
Sex differences in humans
Sex differences in humans, or gender differences in humans, have been studied in a variety of fields. In humans, biological sex is determined by five factors present at birth: the presence or absence of a Y chromosome, the type of gonads, the sex hormones, the internal reproductive anatomy (such as the uterus in females), and the external genitalia.[1] Genetic sex is determined solely by the presence or absence of a Y chromosome. A child's presumed sex is determined at birth by observation of the external genitalia.

Sex differences in humans
[Doc: Sex differences in humans | ID: 18c6d4df-2fc6-4f94-8518-ef96ce7dbd29 | Section: NQ Benchmark doc100070]
Sex differences in humans
The most obvious differences between males and females include all the features related to reproductive role, notably the endocrine (hormonal) systems and their physiological and behavioral effects, including gonadal differentiation, internal and external genital and breast differentiation, and differentiation of muscle mass, height, and hair distribution.

Lunar phase
[Doc: Lunar phase | ID: 06afad21-8bce-45f0-a063-e827d8bb2ed4 | Section: NQ Benchmark doc45316]
These are the instances when the Moon's ecliptic longitude and the Sun's ecliptic longitude differ by 0째, 90째, 180째, and 270째, respectively.[a] Each of these phases occur at slightly different times when viewed from different points on Earth. During the intervals between principal phases, the Moon's apparent shape is either crescent or gibbous. These shapes, and the periods when the Moon shows them, are called the intermediate phases and last one-quarter of a synodic month, or 7.38 days, on average.

sampled_generation_cases.query: who came up with the idea of the transcontinental railroad
sampled_generation_cases.answer: Dr. Hartwell Carver came up with the idea of the transcontinental railroad. He advocated for it in 1832 and later submitted a proposal to the U.S. Congress in 1847 seeking a charter to build the railroad from Lake Michigan to the Pacific Ocean [Doc: First Transcontinental Railroad, Section: General].
retrieval_contexts:
Opposition to the War of 1812 in the United States
[Doc: Opposition to the War of 1812 in the United States | ID: 9063d2c5-4f93-45d7-8dd0-0434a903a6d2 | Section: NQ Benchmark doc47371]
In the elections that followed in a few months, some members of Congress who voted for war, paid the price.

History of Mexico City
[Doc: History of Mexico City | ID: 944aef6a-80a4-48f2-a210-20e136d80d4d | Section: NQ Benchmark doc107186]
No one but Cortés wanted to rebuild the Aztec site. Most of the other conquistadors wanted the new city to be closer to the mountains, pastures and groves they would need for supplies, for example in Tacuba or in Coyoacán.

History of Mexico City
[Doc: History of Mexico City | ID: 944aef6a-80a4-48f2-a210-20e136d80d4d | Section: NQ Benchmark doc107186]
Some accounts state that the Aztec islet was chosen because its location was strategic, allowing for rapid communication by boat to communities on the shorelines.

Opposition to the War of 1812 in the United States
[Doc: Opposition to the War of 1812 in the United States | ID: 9063d2c5-4f93-45d7-8dd0-0434a903a6d2 | Section: NQ Benchmark doc47371]
Henry Clay and John C. Calhoun pushed a declaration of war through Congress, stressing a short war had the added benefit of permitting the United States to grab valuable farmlands in the British colony of Canada.
generation_contexts:
History of Mexico City
[Doc: History of Mexico City | ID: 944aef6a-80a4-48f2-a210-20e136d80d4d | Section: NQ Benchmark doc107186]
No one but Cortés wanted to rebuild the Aztec site. Most of the other conquistadors wanted the new city to be closer to the mountains, pastures and groves they would need for supplies, for example in Tacuba or in Coyoacán.

Opposition to the War of 1812 in the United States
[Doc: Opposition to the War of 1812 in the United States | ID: 9063d2c5-4f93-45d7-8dd0-0434a903a6d2 | Section: NQ Benchmark doc47371]
In the elections that followed in a few months, some members of Congress who voted for war, paid the price.

sampled_generation_cases.query: how many championships did kobe win after shaq
sampled_generation_cases.answer: Kobe won one championship after Shaq. After the Lakers won the title in Game 7 of the 2010 Finals, Bryant said, "Just one more than Shaq ..." [Doc: Shaq–Kobe feud, Section: General].

sampled_generation_cases.query: where is the tibia and fibula bone located
sampled_generation_cases.answer: The tibia and fibula bones are located in the leg. The fibula is on the lateral side of the tibia, and they are connected above and below [Doc: Fibula, Section: General].
retrieval_contexts:
Fibula
[Doc: Fibula | ID: 682e19e9-7a22-4650-9f8d-987cba5f8577 | Section: NQ Benchmark doc102543]
Fibula
The fibula or calf bone is a leg bone located on the lateral side of the tibia, with which it is connected above and below.

Fibula
[Doc: Fibula | ID: 682e19e9-7a22-4650-9f8d-987cba5f8577 | Section: NQ Benchmark doc102543]
Its upper extremity is small, placed toward the back of the head of the tibia, below the level of the knee joint, and excluded from the formation of this joint. Its lower extremity inclines a little forward, so as to be on a plane anterior to that of the upper end; it projects below the tibia, and forms the lateral part of the ankle-joint.

Crowne Plaza
[Doc: Crowne Plaza | ID: dcbe37d2-cd1d-490c-897f-0447aeec3bdc | Section: NQ Benchmark doc16542]
It forms part of the InterContinental Hotels Group family of brands, which include InterContinental Hotels & Resorts and Holiday Inn Hotels & Resorts, and operates in 52 countries with more than 400 hotels, usually located in city centers, resorts, coastal towns or near major airports.

Sperm
[Doc: Sperm | ID: 0bc125c9-06fd-40bb-ada1-76f6f2a45ddc | Section: NQ Benchmark doc579]
This takes place in the mitochondria located in the sperm's midpiece (at the base of the sperm head).

Meninges
[Doc: Meninges | ID: e5286387-8e66-45ef-b528-b002d0169474 | Section: NQ Benchmark doc36661]
The pia mater is pierced by blood vessels to the brain and spinal cord, and its capillaries nourish the brain.

sampled_generation_cases.query: when were the words under god added to the pledge
sampled_generation_cases.answer: The words "under God" were added to the Pledge of Allegiance on Flag Day in 1954. This was the most recent alteration of its wording[Doc: Pledge of Allegiance (United States), Section: General].
retrieval_contexts:
Pledge of Allegiance (United States)
[Doc: Pledge of Allegiance (United States) | ID: 08c49f8d-e333-40b0-89b7-cf93e0c14037 | Section: NQ Benchmark doc50543]
The most recent alteration of its wording came on Flag Day in 1954, when the words "under God" were added.[6]

Pledge of Allegiance (United States)
[Doc: Pledge of Allegiance (United States) | ID: 08c49f8d-e333-40b0-89b7-cf93e0c14037 | Section: NQ Benchmark doc50543]
The form of the pledge used today was largely devised by Francis Bellamy in 1892, and formally adopted by Congress as the pledge in 1942.[5] The official name of The Pledge of Allegiance was adopted in 1945.

Opposition to the War of 1812 in the United States
[Doc: Opposition to the War of 1812 in the United States | ID: 9063d2c5-4f93-45d7-8dd0-0434a903a6d2 | Section: NQ Benchmark doc47371]
The governors of these two states as well as Rhode Island refused to place their state militias under federal control for duty outside their respective states.

Republic of Ireland
[Doc: Republic of Ireland | ID: 2bde1a09-970d-46bd-9fd6-5337b3ab72ca | Section: NQ Benchmark doc82772]
Since the signing of the Good Friday Agreement in 1998, the Irish government and Northern Ireland Executive have co-operated on a number of policy areas under the North-South Ministerial Council created by the Agreement.

History of Mexico City
[Doc: History of Mexico City | ID: 944aef6a-80a4-48f2-a210-20e136d80d4d | Section: NQ Benchmark doc107186]
Some accounts state that the Aztec islet was chosen because its location was strategic, allowing for rapid communication by boat to communities on the shorelines.
